title: Maringá, PR — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Maringá is a city in PR with a population of 436,472. A planned city in northern Paraná, known for its green spaces, the iconic Catedral de Maringá, and strong agricultural sector.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
